full_text:
Zhang Xiu (Shusi) 張休 (叔嗣)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Xiu (張休), styledShusi (叔嗣), was born in Pengcheng. Advised Sun Deng with Zhuge Ke, Gu Tan, and Chen Biao. Lost faction struggle. Zhang Xiu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhang Xiu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
